questions.question: How many zeroes can a polynomial of degree 4 have at most?
questions.answer: A polynomial of degree 4 can have at most four zeroes.

questions.question: What does it mean if a polynomial has no zeroes?
questions.answer: It means the graph of the polynomial does not cut the x-axis.

questions.question: What does it mean if a polynomial has exactly two zeroes?
questions.answer: The graph of the polynomial cuts the x-axis at two points.

questions.question: How can zeroes of a polynomial be verified?
questions.answer: By substituting the value in the polynomial and checking if it equals zero.

questions.question: What is the degree of the polynomial 7x³ − 4x + 1?
questions.answer: The degree of the polynomial is 3.

questions.question: What is the value of the polynomial x² − 4 at x = 2?
questions.answer: The value is zero.

questions.question: What does it indicate if p(a) = 0?
questions.answer: It indicates that a is a zero of the polynomial.

questions.question: What is the degree of the polynomial 5x − 9?
questions.answer: The degree of the polynomial is 1.

questions.question: What is the degree of the polynomial 8?
questions.answer: The degree of the polynomial is 0.

questions.question: What is the degree of the polynomial 0?
questions.answer: The degree of the zero polynomial is not defined.

questions.question: What is the shape of the graph of a cubic polynomial?
questions.answer: It is a curved graph that can cut the x-axis at up to three points.

questions.question: How many x-intercepts can a quadratic polynomial have?
questions.answer: A quadratic polynomial can have at most two x-intercepts.

questions.question: What does the graph tell about the number of zeroes?
questions.answer: It shows how many times the graph intersects the x-axis.

questions.question: What type of polynomial is ax² + bx?
questions.answer: It is a quadratic polynomial.

questions.question: What happens to the graph if a polynomial has repeated zeroes?
questions.answer: The graph touches the x-axis instead of cutting it.

questions.question: What is the coefficient of x in 4x² − 7x + 1?
questions.answer: The coefficient of x is −7.

questions.question: What is the constant term of the polynomial −3x + 8?
questions.answer: The constant term is 8.

questions.question: What is the value of p(1) for p(x) = x² − 1?
questions.answer: The value is zero.

questions.question: What does a horizontal line graph represent?
questions.answer: It represents a constant polynomial.

questions.question: What is the relation between degree and zeroes?
questions.answer: The maximum number of zeroes equals the degree.

questions.question: What type of polynomial is 2x³ + x?
questions.answer: It is a cubic polynomial.

questions.question: What is the value of p(−1) for p(x) = x² − 1?
questions.answer: The value is zero.

questions.question: What does it mean if a graph does not intersect the x-axis?
questions.answer: It means the polynomial has no real zeroes.

questions.question: What is the polynomial obtained when x = 0 is substituted?
questions.answer: The constant term is obtained.

questions.question: What is the graphical method used for in polynomials?
questions.answer: It is used to find the number of zeroes of a polynomial.
